text: Hey please put a couple of weights on the bottom just to make sure it is not top heavy
text_zh: 嘿，请在底部放几个重物，这样就不会头重脚轻了

text: Yall made sure to call out Taylor damn
text_zh: 你们倒是提了泰勒的名字啊Damn

text: damn do yall even like taylor?
text_zh: 你们是真的喜欢泰勒吗？

text: Do I know what a nex playground is? No. Did I watch the whole video like I was going to be tested afterward? Yes.
text_zh: 我知道 Nex Playground 是什么吗？不知道。但我把整个视频看完了，好像之后要被考试一样。是的。

text: Be nice to Taylor! She’s not trying her best but she did show up with coffee
text_zh: 对 Taylor 好点！她不是在尽力，但她确实带了咖啡过来

text: as a person who continually has to build solutions to keep adults in an industrial environment from destroying machines because they want to get out of working I genuinely am impressed by your forethought and your effort to make it as safe and long lasting as possible I think you did a terrific job I really love your wonderful ideas
text_zh: 作为一个经常要开发解决方案来防止成年人在工业环境中因为想逃避工作而毁坏机器的人，我真的对你考虑周全和努力让它尽可能安全耐用印象深刻，我觉得你做得太棒了，我真的非常喜欢你那些绝妙的点子

text: Wasn’t expecting for Taylor to get called out in this video but she did.
text_zh: 没想到这个视频里会提到 Taylor，但她被提到了。

text: I am a little concerned about some kid(s) rocking the stand like, making it fall on them or the floor. Perhaps you guys could think of a way to secure it to the wall in a way that isn't as complicated as screwing it to the wall?
text_zh: 我有点担心会有孩子摇晃架子，导致它倒下压到他们或者掉到地上。你们或许可以想一个不用像拧螺丝那样复杂的方式把它固定在墙上？

text: As a mother of autistic child.. where did you get that TV screen protector?! He's already broke 3 TVs!
text_zh: 作为一个自闭症孩子的母亲… 你那个电视屏幕保护膜是在哪儿买的？！他已经砸坏3个电视了！

text: Why we throwing Taylor under the bus like this, she brought coffee!!😂😂
text_zh: 为什么我们要这样黑泰勒，她还带了咖啡！！😂😂

text: I have a plexiglass cover on my TV. my kids have thrown things and my TV has survived. we lost a TV ONCE and invested lol
text_zh: 我的电视上装了块亚克力板。我孩子扔东西，电视都活下来了。我们曾经摔坏过一台电视，所以就投资了 lol

text: I would find a corner this could be in and out a baby gate around it at least a three foot gap. May have to reset the pay space but I feel like it would be worth it.
text_zh: 我会找个角落把它放进去，然后用婴儿门围起来，至少留出三英尺的距离。可能需要重置空间，但我感觉这样做是值得的。

text: They’re gonna tip the whole thing over
text_zh: 他们会把整个东西弄倒的

text: drill little holes into the side of box for air vent
text_zh: 在盒子的侧面钻些小孔当通风口

text: since its acrylic, maybe you could drill a few holes in the side where the ventlation on the nex box is to help ventliate it from the acrylic box too?
text_zh: 因为是亚克力材质，也许你可以在 Nex Box 通风口旁边的侧面钻几个孔，帮助亚克力盒子也进行通风？

text: You should just put the tv in a metal box on the wall like they do in jail🤣
text_zh: 你们应该学监狱里那样，把电视装金属盒子里挂墙上🤣

text: to attach the console container to the stand, you could drill a hole through the shelf that it's on and a hole through the container + put a bolt. then you don't have to worry about straps or anything. it'd be impossible to remove without unscrewing everything
text_zh: 要把主机盒子固定在支架上，你可以在它所在的架子上钻个洞，也在盒子上钻个洞 + 穿个螺栓。这样就不用担心绑带之类的了。不拧下所有东西就别想拆下来。

text: I worked at a kids place that had a tv and it was in a giant tv hutch with other storage for toys and they put the tv and all of its bits in the hutch behind a lockable plexiglass door it worked great
text_zh: 我以前在一个有电视的儿童场所工作，电视在一个很大的电视柜里，还有其他玩具柜，他们把电视和所有配件都锁在一个带锁的亚克力门后面，效果很棒

text: Get a computer fan and mount to one of the panels of that box. They’re cheap and will help keep it cool
text_zh: 弄个电脑风扇，装到那个盒子的某个面板上。它们很便宜，能帮它降温

text: Do I have a nex? No Do I run a play center? No Dis I watch this whole video? Yes I did 😂
text_zh: 我有 Nex 吗？没有。我开个游乐中心吗？没有。我看完整段视频了吗？是的，我看了 😂

text: Love it!! Poor Taylor ❤️❤️❤️😂😂😂
text_zh: 太喜欢了！！可怜的Taylor ❤️❤️❤️😂😂😂

text: Is it going to be secured to a wall… all I can see is a kid trying to climb it and it toppling over
text_zh: 它会固定在墙上吗……我只看到一个孩子试图爬上去，然后它倒下来了

text: Dang I want one for my classroom but over my dead body am I paying that price. No wonder we are trying to give it prison treatment. I would too 🤣
text_zh: 哎哟，我想要一个给我的教室，但做梦吧，我不会付那个价钱。难怪我们都在想给它像监狱一样对待。我也会这么做的 🤣

text: See that was your first mistake, it’s never child proof
text_zh: 看吧，那是你犯的第一个错误，它永远不会有防熊孩子的功能

text: I wonder if you could use a no drill tv mount situation and attach the whole unit against the wall or beam somewhere so cords are less accessible and a kid doesnt/cant accidentally knock it over. kinda like the zebozap situation but somehow connect the whole unit so it can easily be removed but it also cant be pulled over.
text_zh: 我想知道能不能用不用打孔的电视支架，然后把整个东西装在墙上或者梁上，这样线就没那么容易够到，孩子也不会不小心弄倒。有点像Zebozap那种，但能把整个东西固定好，方便拆卸，又不会被推倒。

text: For the box its self maybe get a pc case that has fans so it doesnt get overheated.
text_zh: 对于盒子本身，或许可以弄个带风扇的 PC 机箱，这样就不会过热。

text: We just got the NEX playground and plan on using it for my homeschool group! Thanks for the tips!
text_zh: 我们刚买了 NEX playground，打算给我的居家学校小组用！谢谢你的建议！

text: hopefully it works for you all. It’s sensors pick up on anyone standing behind people playing and mess up the game ever just with only my boys playing.
text_zh: 希望它对你们都管用。它的传感器会捕捉到站在游戏玩家后面的人，即使只有我的儿子们在玩也会干扰游戏。

text: I love when you showed what it does
text_zh: 我喜欢你展示它功能的时候

text: You could put some rubber drawer stoppers on each of the 4 corners of the tv to push the screen protector just a liiiitle further away from the screen
text_zh: 你可以在电视机的四个角落各放一个橡胶门挡，把屏幕保护膜往屏幕上推一点点。

text: oh my God I need one of those screen protector things I will never have to deal with a smudge on my f****** TV ever again I don't have to worry about children either oh my God I need that
text_zh: 我的天呐我需要那个屏幕保护膜！我再也不用处理我他妈电视上的指纹了，也不用担心孩子了，我的天呐我需要那个

text: Wouldn't say it's necessary but you can get cord covers for the cables going up the back.
text_zh: 不至于说必要，但你可以买线缆保护套，缠绕在后面的线缆上。

text: Put the sticky pad because you could push the box out of that strap
text_zh: 粘上那个垫子，不然盒子会被那个带子推出去了

text: Melt some small holes in the box to add air flow
text_zh: 在盒子上戳些小洞增加空气流通

text: reminds me of the good old days when there used to be an AV Kid
text_zh: 让我想起了以前那个 AV Kid 的好日子

text: Why not go old school and make a Formica box
text_zh: 为什么不老套路，做个美耐板的盒子

text: I’m on Taylor’s side
text_zh: 我站泰勒这边

text: The wires mounted to the tv looks clean
text_zh: 电视上的电线看起来很整洁

text: DON'T BULLY TAYLOR!!!
text_zh: 别欺负泰勒！！！

text: Who’s your spirit animal?- Taylor
text_zh: 你是什么精神动物？- 泰勒

text: Taylor catching strays 😅
text_zh: 泰勒躺着中枪 😅

text: crazy that everyone thinks I haven't put thought into it's placement and where it will be set up so it can't flip, after already overthinking the hell out the entire thing. 😳😂
text_zh: 真是疯狂，每个人都觉得我没考虑好它怎么摆放，以及放在哪里才不会翻倒，我已经把这整个事情想得够多了。😳😂

text: You could strap the nex box to the back of the tv and use an ir repeater for the remote. No need for the box that would overheat it.
text_zh: 你可以把 Nex Box 绑在电视后面，然后用红外线重复器控制遥控器。没必要用那个会过热的盒子。

text: Drill holes in the box so the box can vent and then drill holes in the bottom and use a washer and a bolt and a nut to make the box not move. And then anchor the tv stand to the wall
text_zh: 在盒子上钻孔让盒子透气，然后在底部钻孔，用垫圈、螺栓和螺母固定盒子。然后把电视柜固定在墙上

text: You did exactly what I was thinking in my head🤣🤣
text_zh: 你完全说出了我的心声🤣🤣

text: I need this set up for my kids
text_zh: 我需要给我的孩子们设置这个

text: Never heard of nex playground . It’s $250 ?
text_zh: 从来没听过nex playground。要250美元？

text: Silicone will trap heat I would put a small fan on the box so it has better ventilation. Definitely add some stabilizing legs. Good work though.
text_zh: 硅胶会积热，我建议在盒子上放个小风扇，这样通风会更好。一定要加一些稳固的脚。不过做得很好。

text: You could use a drill to allow air flow and just use I drill bit smaller than Littles fingers. If you do don't push on the drill allow the drill to "pull" it's self into the box or it'll Crack the box
text_zh: 你可以用电钻打个洞让空气流通，然后用比小孩手指小的钻头。如果这样做的话，不要用力按电钻，让电钻自己“拉”进去，不然盒子会裂开

text: This is actually genius!! Great job!
text_zh: 这简直是天才！！干得漂亮！

text: Hey random thought! Get a “stepper drill bit” (& cutting fluid) and you can drill air holes in the acrylic box for venting. Make sure not to use a regular drill bit or you’ll probably crack the acrylic. Otherwise this is such great work!
text_zh: 嘿，突然有个想法！买一个“阶梯钻头”（和切削液），你就可以在亚克力盒上钻孔通风了。一定要用专门的钻头，否则你可能会把亚克力弄裂。除此之外，这项工作做得太棒了！

text: i got my own playground?
text_zh: 我有了自己的游乐场？

text: Maybe drill holes on the sides and top for ventilation and definitely add the tape to bottom...stealing is unfortunate
text_zh: 也许在侧面和顶部钻些孔用于通风，并且一定要在底部加上胶带……偷东西真让人遗憾

text: My kids played this at Walmart 2 weekends ago and had so much fun. Its the same price in Walmart as it is here.
text_zh: 我孩子上周末在沃尔玛玩了这个，玩得可开心了。沃尔玛的价格跟这里一样。

text: Please update with how it/if it survives!!
text_zh: 请更新一下，看看它能不能活下来！！

text: Maybe drill a few small holes in the box so it can get air and a pool noodle cut on the leg of the stand would add another touch of protection for the remote
text_zh: 也许可以在盒子上钻几个小孔让它透气，然后在支架腿上套个泳圈，这样能更好地保护遥控器

text: Do I have a playground place or even a toddler? No. Did I watch this whole video and take notes…just in case? Yes I did.
text_zh: 我有没有游乐场或者小孩？没有。我有没有看完整视频还做了笔记…以防万一？有。

text: Okay I love this but something keeps running through my head. How heavy is it? Because I keep thinking how easy is it to push over. Not only could that break it but what if it falls on a kid.
text_zh: 好吧我爱死这个了，但有个东西一直在我想。它有多重？因为我一直在想它多容易被推倒。不仅会把它弄坏，万一掉到小孩身上怎么办。

text: Can you drill air holes into the acrylic box so that it can ventilate better and not overheat itself?
text_zh: 能给亚克力盒钻些气孔，让它通风更好，不至于过热吗？

text: Could you drill holes in the box so that it will have vents once you get it to the point of locking?
text_zh: 等你收到的时候能不能在盒子上钻几个洞，这样它就有通风口了？

text: As a mom of a toddler who loved everything electrical thank you for thinking of the cords. I can’t tell you how many places we’ve been for kids with exposed outlets and/or loose cords.
text_zh: 作为一个爱玩一切电器产品的幼儿妈妈，非常感谢你们考虑到了电线。我跟你说有多少地方我们带孩子去过，结果都是暴露的插座或者松动的电线。

text: For the plastic screen protector corners I would put something soft just in case a child jumps under it and hits their head.
text_zh: 对于塑料屏幕保护膜的边角，我建议放点软的东西，以防孩子跳过来撞到头。

text: Idk if it’s cheaper than nex these days, but we had an Eye Toy for the PS2 that was the best as a kid. Highly recommend as a [potentially] cheaper option
text_zh: 不知道现在是不是比nex便宜，但我们以前PS2有个EyeToy，小时候觉得超棒。强烈推荐，可能也是个更便宜的选择

text: you should find a way to hold the top to the wall temporarily, knowing kids they'll find a way to tip it over
text_zh: 你应该想办法暂时把上面那个固定在墙上，要知道小孩子肯定会想办法把它弄倒的

text: Definitely put the velcro under the box.
text_zh: 绝对要把魔术贴粘在盒子的下面。

text: use the sticky stuff to secure the nex to the bottom of the box so it's less likely to be shaken around if they somehow manage to remove the acrylic box
text_zh: 用粘性材料把 Nex 固定在盒子的底部，这样万一他们能把亚克力盒子弄掉，它也不太可能被晃动

text: A protective pad for the one leg of the stand that the remote falls against might help protect the remote.
text_zh: 为底座那条会撞到遥控器的腿加个保护垫或许能保护遥控器。

text: Dang poor Taylor. That comment was personal
text_zh: 哎哟，可怜的泰勒。那条评论太针对了

text: no, put a full plexiglass case over it with a few inches of room, even if a child runs into it they won't touch anything.
text_zh: 不，应该给它装一个完整的玻璃柜，留几英寸的空间，这样即使孩子撞上去也不会碰到任何东西。

text: all of this and I still don't know what it does 😂
text_zh: 说了这么多，我还是不知道它到底是干嘛的 😂

text: Justice for Taylor😂
text_zh: 给泰勒一个公道 😂

text: could you use a screen protector hanging from the ceiling instead?
text_zh: 能不能用一个挂在天花板上的屏幕保护膜代替？

text: I need the screen protector to for my cats
text_zh: 我需要这个屏幕保护膜给我的猫咪

text: Can you secure it to the wall in anyway?
text_zh: 可以把它固定在墙上吗？

text: I give it 17 unsupervised minutes.
text_zh: 我给它17分钟无人看管的时间。

text: Maybe start holding parents accountable monetarily if thier spawn breaks things being awful.
text_zh: 也许应该让那些熊孩子搞坏东西的家长在经济上承担责任。

text: Put some pool noodles onto the legs to help protect the remote when it falls
text_zh: 在腿上套上一些泳圈，以防遥控器摔坏。

text: Buying a ps2 eye toy in 2025 is crazy
text_zh: 2025年还在买PS2的EyeToy，疯了吧

text: poor Taylor catchin strays 🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣
text_zh: 可怜的泰勒被连累了 🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣

text: you said you were gonna make it childproof and then turned the camera around to show me a huge glass and metal contraption. what part of this says childproof to you
text_zh: 你说你要让它适合儿童使用，然后转过身来给我看一个巨大的玻璃金属装置。你觉得这有什么地方适合儿童使用？

text: can't wait to see how they destroy it
text_zh: 等不及看他们怎么搞砸它了

text: Why are yall so mean to the coffee girl
text_zh: 你们为什么对咖啡店的那个女孩那么刻薄

text: Smart!
text_zh: 聪明！

text: I know you may not need to hear this since by watching this, y'all are professionals and have thought all this through. But you should get a T-shaped latch lock to mount the box to the surface of the shelf. This way you can remove it if you need to swap it out for another thing and add more holes to let air in and the console's hot air out. It doesn't have to be too big for fingers as long as there are enough ventilation holes to keep it from overheating where the fan is blowing out the hot air.
text_zh: 我知道你可能不需要听到这些，因为看你这个视频，你们都是专家，都考虑周全了。但你应该弄个T型锁扣把盒子固定在架子上。这样你就可以在需要更换的时候把它取下来，再多打几个孔让空气流通，把游戏机的热风排出去。不用太大，只要有足够的通风孔，就不会在风扇吹出热风的地方过热。

text: I fear it may topple over
text_zh: 我怕它会倒

text: drill some holes in the box. not familiar with this device however it needs to breathe
text_zh: 在盒子上钻几个洞。不熟悉这个设备，但它需要呼吸

text: That game system is probably going to overheat in that box, all that money wasted just to break it yourseld
text_zh: 这个游戏机放那个盒子里估计会过热，花那么多钱结果自己把它弄坏了

text: They are gonna knock it over. Be sure to bolt it to the wall or the floor
text_zh: 他们会把它撞倒的。确保把它固定在墙上或地板上

text: does the TV make it top heavy?
text_zh: 电视会不会让它头重脚轻？

text: take a router and cut lines through the plasic safe box to get airflow through the box and not able to put pencils or fingers through
text_zh: 拿个路由器，在塑料保险箱上划几道线，让盒子通风，这样铅笔或手指就伸不进去了

text: What if a kid pulls in it? Will it topple over?
text_zh: 要是小孩拽一下呢？会不会倒？

text: MUSEUM WAX FOR THE BOX! no leftover residue afterwards (with the strap obviously)
text_zh: 盒子装的博物馆蜡！没有残留物（当然要配合那个带子）

text: I would drill some vent holes to the side of the acrylic case that's facing the fans, overheating will kill your box
text_zh: 我会钻几个通风孔到亚克力盒子侧面，对着风扇。过热会毁了你的盒子

text: Leave Taylor alone
text_zh: 放过泰勒吧

text: Throw things at it to test
text_zh: 扔东西砸它测试一下

text: My favorite thing in school was when the teacher would call on me to go get the TV!!!
text_zh: 我上学时最喜欢的事情就是老师叫我去拿电视！！！

text: drill air holes in the plexiglass box
text_zh: 在亚克力盒子上钻几个通风孔

text: You are kidding yourself. Wherr there os a will, you know a child will play.😂🤣😂🤣 🍀
text_zh: 你在骗自己。有志者事竟成，你知道孩子们会玩的。😂🤣😂🤣🍀

text: use museum wax!! that box won't move!!!
text_zh: 用博物馆粘土试试！！那个盒子就不会动了！！！

text: i know a retired bhaddie when i see one
text_zh: 我一眼就认出了个退休的美女

text: Drill some holes in the back of the acrylic case so that it has some airflow, but make sure the holes are small enough that small fingers can’t get in them
text_zh: 在亚克力盒子背面钻几个孔，这样可以通风，但要确保孔足够小，小孩子的手指进不去。

text: Drill holes and bolt it to the cart.
text_zh: 打个洞然后用螺栓固定在推车上。

text: my 2 year old would flip that cart so fast
text_zh: 我两岁的孩子会很快推翻那个推车

text: Drill holes on the side of box to have ventilation so it won’t get hot
text_zh: 在盒子侧面打孔以通风，这样就不会太热了

text: I would cover the leg that the remote hits with a pool noodle
text_zh: 我会用一根泳圈管包住那个遥控器会打到的腿
